name: Mechado
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown meat in cooking oil, set aside.
2. In the same oil, saute garlic and onion until fragrant. Add lime, soy sauce, pepper, tomato sauce, bay leaf, and salt. Simmer for 3-5 minutes.
3. Add meat and water. Cover and simmer until meat is tender.
4. Add potatoes and carrot. When vegetables are done, slice the meat. Arrange on a platter with vegetables. Strain the sauce and pour over the meat.
